CustomField.formula: IF ( ISBLANK(Result_SalesDate__c), IF ( ISBLANK(Latest_SalesDate__c), IF ( ISBLANK(Order_SalesDate__c), '', TEXT(YEAR(Order_SalesDate__c)) & '/' & LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Order_SalesDate__c)), 2, '0') ), TEXT(YEAR(Latest_SalesDate__c)) & '/' & LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Latest_SalesDate__c)), 2, '0') ), TEXT(YEAR(Result_SalesDate__c)) & '/' & LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Result_SalesDate__c)), 2, '0') )
CustomField.label: 売上年月
